response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role explicitly requires a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 10-13 years of professional post-degree experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no principal/director-level scope, and only recent, light exposure to AI-agent tooling. The profile does not match a Principal Engineer AI Strategy role advising strategic customers on cutting-edge AI.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and infrastructure experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
Active community contributor with workshops, talks, and OSS libraries demonstrating thought-sharing ability
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI/ML products or platforms — central requirement of the role
Experience level and scope is senior/staff IC, not Director-level Principal with strategic advisory track record
Limited cloud-platform strategy depth; cloud exposure is primarily AWS CDK as a consumer, not platform-level design

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI expertise and products
Seniority and strategic scope below Director/Principal level
